who: insurance compliance officers in small to mid-sized insurance firms processing 5–15 policies/month
offer: For insurance compliance officers in small to mid-sized insurance firms processing 5–15 policies/month, manual report compilation causes delays in compliance verification. We automate report generation instead of manual report compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in compiling timely compliance reports for insurance policies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance compliance officers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance compliance officers with demo video
Community forums where compliance officers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
